sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (id INTEGER, data MAP<INTEGER, INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_map (id, data) VALUES (1, map([100, 200], [42, 43]));
UPDATE test_map SET data = map_insert(data, 300, 44) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT map_extract(data, 100) FROM test_map WHERE id = 1;
SELECT map_extract(data, 300) AS retrieved_value FROM test_map WHERE id = 1;
